title: Project Manager – Defence Mechanical Systems (SC Cleared)
description_raw:
Carbon60 are recruiting for an experienced Project Manager to join a defence prime contractor’s mechanical systems team in Stevenage on a 12-month outside IR35 contract assignment.

The successful candidate will manage the design and development phase of a complex mechanical subsystem forming part of a ground-based defence platform. This is a security-sensitive programme; active SC (Security Check) clearance is required.

Key responsibilities:
- Lead the mechanical engineering delivery team (15 FTEs) through SRR/PDR/CDR in accordance with DEF STAN 00-600 and the programme’s Systems Engineering Management Plan (SEMP)
- Manage programme risk register (Monte Carlo schedule risk analysis experience beneficial)
- Coordinate with ILS (Integrated Logistic Support) and COTS procurement workstreams
- Produce EVM (Earned Value Management) monthly status reports for the Programme Manager
- Manage subcontractor NDA requirements and ITT/ITQ processes

Background:
- Degree in mechanical, structural or systems engineering
- Minimum 8 years’ project management in defence or aerospace sector
- Familiarity with DEF STAN standards, CADMID lifecycle, and SE V-model
- IPA project delivery professional or PRINCE2 Practitioner preferred
- Active SC clearance required at start — no sponsorship offered

Rate: £750 per day, outside IR35
Duration: 12 months (probable extension through CDR and beyond)
Start: 7 September 2026 (latest; earlier start considered)
Location: Stevenage; site-based 5 days a week (no hybrid)
